introSection: Fahrenheit is an Intamin sit-down roller coaster located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA.

sections.title: Marketing
sections.content:
The ride's marketing campaign started as a post on the roller coaster website, ThrillNetwork regarding the sight of businessmen in the general area of where Fahrenheit was going to be built. The post included a link to the website, Nantimi.com. 

Over the course of the next few months, Hersheypark revealed more details in the form of e-mails, forum posts, and the Nantimi website.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Fahrenheit features a vertical lift hill and a beyond vertical drop at an angle of 97 degrees. It is also one of the only three roller coasters in the world to feature a norwegian loop.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with 3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

fullText:
Fahrenheit is an Intamin sit-down roller coaster located at Hersheypark in Hershey, Pennsylvania, USA.

The ride's marketing campaign started as a post on the roller coaster website, ThrillNetwork regarding the sight of businessmen in the general area of where Fahrenheit was going to be built. The post included a link to the website, Nantimi.com. 

Over the course of the next few months, Hersheypark revealed more details in the form of e-mails, forum posts, and the Nantimi website.

Fahrenheit features a vertical lift hill and a beyond vertical drop at an angle of 97 degrees. It is also one of the only three roller coasters in the world to feature a norwegian loop.

3 trains with 3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.
